content:
Let f(x)=ax+b.  Then

LHS =f(x−1)+f(x)+f(x+1)=3ax+3b,  
RHS =f(x)²/(2013x)=(ax+b)²/(2013x).

Clearing denominators gives
6039a x²+6039b x=(ax+b)²=a²x²+2ab x+b².
Equating coefficients:

x²: 6039a=a² ⇒ a=6039 (a≠0),  
x¹: 6039b=2ab ⇒6039b=2·6039 b ⇒b=0,  
const: 0=b² ⇒b=0.

Hence f(x)=6039x and f(1)=6039 is the only nonconstant solution.  

Answer: \boxed{6039}.

Equating coefficients:

x²: 6039a=a² ⇒ a=6039 (a≠0),

Hence f(x)=6039x and f(1)=6039 is the only nonconstant solution.
